info.title: MEATNG API
info.description: The MEATNG Backend API documentation. Organised automatically by module dependencies.

requestId.description: Unique request ID generated during signup

token.description: Magic link token received via email

confirmPassword.description: Confirm new password — must match password
Confirm new password — must match newPassword

email.description: Email address of the new admin

firstName.description: First name of the new admin

lastName.description: Last name of the new admin

first_name.description: The first name of the user

last_name.description: The last name of the user

phone.description: The phone number of the user

user_id.description: User ID the address belongs to

label.description: A label for the address (e.g. Home, Office)

is_default.description: Whether this is the default address

is_default.description: Whether this is the default address

slug.description: URL-friendly slug for the category (auto-generated if not provided)

parentCategoryId.description: ID of the parent category. If null, this is a root category.

slug.description: URL-friendly slug for the category (auto-generated if not provided)

parentCategoryId.description: ID of the parent category. If null, this is a root category.

slug.description: Unique slug for the product (auto-generated if not provided)

sku.description: Stock keeping unit (auto-generated if not provided)

displayType.description: How to display the product weight/count. total_weight: mainValue is total package weight (e.g. 1.5 kg). piece_weight: mainValue = pieces, secondaryValue = weight per piece (e.g. 6 × 200 g). multi_pack: mainValue = packs, secondaryValue = weight per pack. count_range: mainValue is total weight, sec/tert are count bounds.

secondaryValue.description: Secondary value for range or pack

unit.description: Weight unit. Only kg and g are supported. Use g for items under 1 kg, kg otherwise.

categories.description: Array of category IDs this product belongs to

temp_id.description: Temp ID from the upload endpoint to link an image

slug.description: Unique slug for the product (auto-generated if not provided)

sku.description: Stock keeping unit (auto-generated if not provided)

displayType.description: How to display the product weight/count. total_weight: mainValue is total package weight (e.g. 1.5 kg). piece_weight: mainValue = pieces, secondaryValue = weight per piece (e.g. 6 × 200 g). multi_pack: mainValue = packs, secondaryValue = weight per pack. count_range: mainValue is total weight, sec/tert are count bounds.

secondaryValue.description: Secondary value for range or pack

unit.description: Weight unit. Only kg and g are supported. Use g for items under 1 kg, kg otherwise.

categories.description: Array of category IDs this product belongs to

temp_id.description: Temp ID from the upload endpoint to link an image

label.description: Display label for this selection slot shown in the UI

min_items.description: Minimum number of items the user must choose from this category

max_items.description: Maximum number of items the user may choose from this category
Maximum number of items allowed in this plan

weight.description: Total weight of the plan box

weight_unit.description: Unit for the plan total weight. Only kg and g are supported.

temp_image_id.description: Temp upload ID for plan image

plan_type.description: Plan type: standard (unrestricted item selection) or custom (category-constrained)

pricing_model.description: Pricing model: fixed flat price defined on the plan, or sum_of_items where total = sum of selected product prices

category_rules.description: Ordered category selection rules. Required when plan_type is "custom". Only categories listed here are available for selection; all others are disabled.

max_items.description: Maximum number of items allowed in this plan

weight.description: Total weight of the plan box

weight_unit.description: Unit for the plan total weight. Only kg and g are supported.

temp_image_id.description: Temp upload ID for plan image

plan_type.description: Plan type: standard (unrestricted item selection) or custom (category-constrained)

pricing_model.description: Pricing model: fixed flat price defined on the plan, or sum_of_items where total = sum of selected product prices

category_rules.description: Ordered category selection rules. Required when plan_type is "custom". Only categories listed here are available for selection; all others are disabled.

planId.description: Plan ID the cart is associated with

productId.description: Product ID to add to cart

quantity.description: New quantity for the cart item

unit_price.description: Unit price at time of order

item_type.description: Whether this is a base (plan-included) or addon item

user_id.description: User ID who owns the order

plan_id.description: Plan ID for the order (if applicable)

auto_subscribe.description: If true, a recurring subscription will be created from this order.

frequency_weeks.description: How often the subscription should repeat in weeks (only if auto_subscribe is true). Defaults to 2.

enable_auto_debit.description: If true, system will auto-charge saved card on next billing date (only if auto_subscribe is true). Defaults to true.

item_type.description: Whether this item is a base (plan-included) or addon item

user_id.description: User ID who owns the subscription

pause_start_date.description: Pause start date (if subscription is paused)

pause_end_date.description: Pause end date (if subscription is paused)

pause_start_date.description: Pause start date (if subscription is paused)

pause_end_date.description: Pause end date (if subscription is paused)

email.description: The email address to subscribe to the newsletter
